notes: Collapsed dual model: patient_level labels + exact pos_weight saddle point. val_pair_auc~0.51, all predictions clustered at 0.502, pred_std=0.00075, is_collapsed=True. Reference anchor for measuring improvement.
BF-only, image-level labels, 128px, 20 epochs. Saddle broken (train_loss decreasing, train_auc>0.5). Val pair AUC 0.574 but weak - 128px too small for egg detection in TinyConv.
BF-only, image-level egg labels, 224px, 20 epochs, upgraded 4-block BN encoder (base_channels=32). Val pair AUC 0.665, patient AUC max 0.635. Confirmed learning — saddle fully broken.

DF-only, image-level egg labels, 224px, 20 epochs. Best val pair AUC 0.683 (epoch 16), patient AUC max 0.623. DF competitive with BF — darkfield scattering makes eggs more distinct. Noisy but learning.

Always-on dual, image-level labels, 224px, 20 epochs. Val loss explodes to 1.4-2.3 while train loss drops (severe overfitting). Val pair AUC never exceeds 0.558. Naive concatenation fusion is unstable — strongly motivates conditional approach over always-on dual.
